summary: This Excel file contains internal product tracking sheets listing technical issues like Google STT timeouts and voicemail costs, alongside a backlog of feature ideas such as latency reduction and long-term memory management. The content outlines development priorities for the AI phone agent, including specific implementation plans and quality logging requirements. Some entries contain Spanish terminology indicating a mixed-language development team or context.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/3. Product/3. Product for Pilots /Copy of Product - Current Issues.xlsx
